title: US senior official says 80-85% confident of signing deal 'in coming days'
snippet: A US senior administration official said they are 80-85% confident of signing the US-Iran deal 'in coming days,' adding 'Not 100%.' Confidence reportedly rose from 75% in the morning to 80-85% by afternoon. The official also stated that Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei is reportedly 'comfortable' with the state of negotiations, a notable shift from previous Iranian denials.
tag_reason: First quantified US confidence level (80-85%); Khamenei 'comfortable' is new intelligence on Supreme Leader's disposition; intra-day confidence increase notable
